reasoning: The changes relate to a technical coding issue affecting the trade mark bulk data product provided to third party subscribers and an update about guidelines in the Patent Manual of Practice and Procedures with a note on seeking special leave to appeal to the High Court. The IPFR page content is a general educational article about IP infringement aimed at small businesses and creators, focusing on explaining infringement concepts in plain English. It does not contain specific procedural details, data product information, or legal guideline references that would be impacted by these updates. Therefore, the changes do not affect the accuracy or currency of the IPFR page content.
